scope_summary: Plan 08 — 4 tasks / 2 tracks. Track 5: T5.1 real supertrend sandbox e2e (mandatory) + T5.2 real supertrend testnet e2e (DP1-conditional real testnet, partial+manual fallback if network unavailable). Track 6: T6.1 sidecar retirement docs (docs-only, records arx web sidecar HTTP→NATS-only migration as an independent arx-side follow-up per DP2=a) + T6.2 Plan 06 + Plan 08 close-out (mandatory final). Deliverables: 2 NEW e2e test files (test_real_supertrend_e2e_sandbox.py + test_real_supertrend_e2e_testnet.py) + optional NEW conftest.py + tests/fixtures/real_supertrend/ fixture mirror (drafter-recommended option iii per T5.1 CR-6) + docs/design/nautilus_host.md 'PS supertrend migration' section (5 subsections) + Plan 06 T6.2 close-out flip → ✅ + Plan 08 close-out flip → ✅ + .forge/README.md index update.

lesson #22/#28 — multi-layer independence for credential-leak-negative (telemetry actor whitelist + envelope schema + structlog processor).

lesson #26 — NATS subject builder unchanged (Plan 08 no wire changes).
lesson #27 — commit scope discipline. git add <specific-file>; git status --short before each commit.
lesson #34 — teammate crossed-instructions guard. git log + git worktree list verify before any pre-merge instruction from team-lead.
lesson #39 — worktree boundary: all commits in-branch including close-out; NEVER checkout main.

spawn_prompt_key_defenses: Foundation Scan Round 1: grep tests/engines/nautilus/*.py before any file edit (understand existing e2e tests + fixture pattern). Language Policy RED LINE: all NEW e2e test files English (identifiers + docstrings + comments + structlog events + assertion messages). PS supertrend migration section in docs/design/nautilus_host.md English. Commit messages English (Conventional Commits, scope custos, subject English). Marker JSON English. T5.1 sandbox e2e discipline: load real ps SuperTrendStrategy via toolkit + custos registry-mode + verify (1) _risk_controller non-None (Plan 06 06a Track 2 wiring live); (2) G6 gate paper-safe boundary (NoopHost or NtTradingNodeHost paper mode; DP3=a golden path only, no live venue); (3) credential leak-negative (sentinel _SENTINEL_API_KEY / _SENTINEL_API_SECRET absent from telemetry payload + DeploymentStatus + structlog captured via caplog); (4) supertrend order emission observable (verifies real strategy is actually running).

T5.2 testnet e2e (DP1=a real testnet): use credential_vault sops+age fixture with a real Binance testnet credential (must not be a mainnet key — test docstring must state 'testnet only, mainnet key = red-line 0.1 violation'). @pytest.mark.integration decorator so make verify baseline skips this. Partial+manual fallback authorized per Plan 06 T5.2 precedent line 287-289 (test docstring names manual acceptance path if network unavailable).

T6.1 sidecar retirement docs (DP2=a arx-side follow-up): docs-only. docs/design/nautilus_host.md new subsection names arx web sidecar HTTP→NATS-only migration as an independent arx-side follow-up plan; anchor the debt without blocking Plan 08. Does not modify src/custos/**.
